resources.string: Consent recorded. Monitoring service can be started.
All permissions are required for call recording to function.
Consent is required to use this app.

This app records phone calls made and received on this device.
A visible, non-dismissible notification will be shown at all times while call recording is active — recording never happens silently.
By continuing, you confirm that you are authorized to enable call recording on this device and that you accept responsibility for complying with the call recording and consent laws that apply in your jurisdiction, including notifying other parties on a call where required by law.
[PLACEHOLDER: Replace this text with the exact disclosure your client\'s legal counsel reviewed and signed off on. Do not ship with placeholder text.]
